note: Binding K here = MAX timepoints over a trial's qualifying survival outcomes (best reconstructable endpoint), so this histogram is an UPPER bound on per-trial anchor density; the cohort census (validate/census_cohort.js) uses the stricter binding MIN-across-arms. Strict vs broad brackets how liberally a 'survival curve' is detected. 0 structured NAR rows across all of AACT is the exact zero-NAR finding. validation_grade_curve_and_hr_* = trials posting both a curve AND an HR (the only registry-truth-validatable subset; the gallery's 30 are this intersection in-cohort).
